evals.prompt: what are my open action items for billing
evals.notes: Two billing actions exist: idx 18 (10d, within month) and idx 19 (20d, within month). The long-pending warehouse action idx 20 (45d, outside month) should NOT appear if a 30d window is applied. Confirms time-window filtering.

evals.prompt: show me all open actions including old ones
evals.notes: No time window applied. The long-pending warehouse pipeline action (idx 20, 45d) should appear, demonstrating the >30d long-pending case.

evals.prompt: do I have any open actions on the warehouse-v2 project
evals.notes: warehouse-v2 is intentionally empty. Expect thin-signal.
